pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiled bytecode is compatible with JDK 21 and prevents accidental usage of APIs from newer JDKs if the build environment is newer.

src/main/java/com/rsc/aicode/common/Dele.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.
